title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Jiva Drinks LLC (“Jiva,” “Company,” “we,” “us,” or “our”) collects, uses, and shares information when you visit https://www.jivalivin.com/ (the “Site”), submit information through the Site, or interact with us online.

blocks.text: When you join our waitlist or contact us, we collect the information you submit, such as your email address and optional first name. We do not collect sensitive personal information such as date of birth, marital status, or government identification through the current interest form.

When you visit the Site, we or our website, hosting, analytics, or form providers may automatically collect certain information, such as your browser type, device type, IP address, pages viewed, referring URL, general site usage, and the date and time of your visit. We use this information to help operate the Site, understand Site traffic, improve user experience, and protect the Site from misuse.

We may use the information we collect to operate and improve the Site, respond to your requests, send updates or marketing communications if you choose to join our list, understand Site traffic and performance, prevent fraud or misuse, comply with legal obligations, and, if online purchases become available in the future, process payments, fulfill orders, and provide customer support.

We do not sell your Personal Information. We may share Personal Information with service providers that help us operate the Site, host forms, send email updates, analyze website traffic, process payments, fulfill orders, or comply with legal obligations.
If we offer online purchases in the future, payments may be processed by third-party payment processors. We do not intend to store full credit or debit card numbers on our own servers.
We keep Personal Information only for as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

The Site is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect Personal Information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected information from a child under 13, please contact us at info@jivalivin.com.
You may opt out of marketing emails by contacting us at info@jivalivin.com. You may also contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of your Personal Information.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be posted on this page with a revised “Last updated” date.
If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or the practices of this Site, please contact us by sending an email to info@jivalivin.com.
